result:
Delivery complete. The Mandrel pipeline ran end-to-end headlessly.

## Summary

**Plan** (`/plan --idea ‚Ä¶ --yes`) ‚Äî Scope triage returned **`story`** (one cohesive capability, no novel architecture), so under `--yes` it routed to the standalone-Story path and created **Story #23**.

**Deliver** (`/deliver 23 --yes`) ‚Äî Single standalone Story ‚Üí single-Story delivery path:
- Init created worktree + `story-23` branch.
- Implemented the server and committed it.
- Closed ‚Üí pushed ‚Üí opened **PR #24** ‚Üí Story-scope code review (0 findings) ‚Üí **merged to `main`** ‚Üí Story flipped to `agent::done`, issue auto-closed ‚Üí local `main` fast-forwarded, all `story-23` refs reaped.

**What shipped** (merged into `main` at `53c7436`):
- `server.js` ‚Äî ESM, `node:http` only (no framework). `GET /` ‚Üí `200`, `Content-Type: text/html`, body `Hello, World!`; other paths ‚Üí `404`. Listens on `PORT` (defensive parse), default `3000`.
- `package.json` ‚Äî `"type": "module"` + `"start": "node server.js"`.

**Verified before close** (manual, since the project ships no test tooling):
- `npm start` ‚Üí `curl -i localhost:3000/` ‚Üí `HTTP 200`, `Content-Type: text/html`, body `Hello, World!`
- `PORT=4567 node server.js` honored the env override; unknown path returned `404`.

**Friction handled / noted:**
- The per-worktree `npm ci` failed (repo has no lockfile) ‚Äî non-fatal; the Story needs no dependencies.
- The close-validation gates (`typecheck`/`lint`/`test`/`format`/`coverage`/`baselines`) invoke npm scripts absent from this bare target. I logged friction to Story #23 and closed with the sanctioned `--skip-validation` bypass after manually verifying behavior. (Notably, the sandbox's own *uncommitted* working-tree edit already provides no-op `typecheck`/`lint`/`test` scripts ‚Äî they just weren't committed.)
- A pre-existing dirty main checkout (27 unrelated scaffolding edits) tripped the wrong-tree guard; I stashed it to close cleanly, then restored it ‚Äî resolving the one `package.json` conflict to keep both the merged `start` script and the sandbox's pre-existing scripts. The working tree is back as I found it.
